nasb.text: I dug wells and drank foreign waters, And with the sole of my feet I dried up All the rivers of Egypt.”

esv.text: I dug wells and drank foreign waters, and I dried up with the sole of my foot all the streams of Egypt.’

cnv.text: 我掘井飲外地的水， 我用腳掌踏乾埃及所有的河道。

ccb.text: 你自夸已在外邦之地挖井取水， 已用脚掌踏干埃及的河流。
